utf-8", errors="replace")
        status_m = re.search(r'HTTP/[\d.]+ (\d+)', resp_str)
        status = int(status_m.group(1)) if status_m else 0
        blocked = status in (403, 406, 503)
        reflected = check_xss(resp_str) if not blocked else False
        
        report(name, status, blocked, reflected, location)
        if reflected:
            print(f"    BODY SNIPPET: {resp_str[resp_str.find('<div>'):resp_str.find('<div>')+200]}")
        return status, blocked, reflected
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  {name:55s} ERR: {str(e)[:60]}")
        return 0, True, False
